blockedAssertions.blockedBy: apps/api package not created yet in monorepo-infra milestone — db:push script defined correctly in root package.json but @galileo/api filter matches no packages, so the command is a no-op (exit 0 with warning). Will be fully testable in the api milestone.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Known Quirks section documenting esbuild build scripts ignored and workspace scope. Added Flow Validator Guidance: CLI/Terminal section with isolation rules, reporting format, and command reference for monorepo-infra testing.

orchestratorOverride.justification: VAL-INFRA-015 (root db scripts) was blocked because apps/api doesn't exist in monorepo-infra milestone. The assertion has been moved from ci-pipeline's fulfills to api-auth-endpoints's fulfills (api milestone) where it can be properly tested. 14/15 assertions passed, the 1 blocked assertion is now tracked in the api milestone.
